name: Kadiska
description: Digital experience monitoring platform combining real-user monitoring, synthetic testing and network analytics.

seo.title: Kadiska — Observability / Logging / Tracing
seo.meta_description: Kadiska: Digital experience monitoring platform combining real-user monitoring, synthetic testing and network analytics.

when_to_use: Real-user monitoring for hybrid cloud app performance
Synthetic testing from branch offices and remote workers
Network path analytics correlated with app experience
SD-WAN performance visibility for distributed teams

pros: Combines RUM, synthetic and network in one view
Strong network path diagnosis for SaaS apps
No-code setup for common digital experience metrics
European hosting option for GDPR concerns
cons: Less known than ThousandEyes or Catchpoint
APM depth limited vs Datadog or New Relic
review.verdict: Competent European DEM alternative, but ThousandEyes and Catchpoint have broader reach and maturity.
review.best_for: European enterprises wanting unified DEM with GDPR-friendly hosting.
review.not_for: Global teams needing the largest vantage-point coverage and established brand.
